data.description:
# Directory reorg + TicketQuery for the list_tickets 14-param replication

## What
- Group `_engine/rebar_reconciler/` (48 flat files) into `acli/`/`outbound/`/`inbound/` and the root `llm/` clusters (`prompting/`, `evals/`) along existing prefix/import seams — reorg only, no file-splitting.
- Introduce a `TicketQuery` dataclass threaded through the inner list layers so a new filter touches 3 sites, not 6 (keep the public/MCP scalar signatures via `**asdict`).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Reconciler + llm subgrouping done; imports updated; subprocess boundary intact; suites green.
- [ ] `TicketQuery` threaded through `_reads`/`list_states`/filter core; public + MCP signatures unchanged; tests green.
- [ ] `make lint` + full suite green; commit(s) carry `rebar-ticket:` trailers.
data.title: Directory reorg + TicketQuery for the list_tickets 14-param replication
